flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Nova Southeastern University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.6k → $38.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Nova Southeastern University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.6k → $38.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Nova Southeastern University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Nova Southeastern University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (6.6k → 7.2k).
